languages.text: "Наблюдение за биомеханическими паттернами, присущими друкари, без сопряженного с этим риска — большая редкость, Вольный Торговец. Я счел, что созерцание и пикт-фиксация происходящего будут более, чем уместны в рамках моих экспериментов".

"Observing Drukhari biomechanical patterns without any accompanying risk is very rare, Rogue Trader. I deemed that watching and pict-recording these events would be more than appropriate within the framework of my experiments."
languages.original_text: "Наблюдение за биомеханическими паттернами, присущими друкари, без сопряженного с этим риска — большая редкость, Вольный Торговец. Я счел, что созерцание и пикт-фиксация происходящего будут более, чем уместны в рамках моих экспериментов".

traits.locale_text: "Observing Drukhari biomechanical patterns without any risk is very rare, Rogue Trader. I felt that watching and pict-recording of these events would be more than appropriate within the framework of my experiments."

"Observing Drukhari biomechanical patterns without any risk is very rare, Rogue Trader. I felt that watching and pict-recording of these events would be more than appropriate within the framework of my experiments."

"Observing Drukhari biomechanical patterns without any accompanying risk is very rare, Rogue Trader. I deemed that watching and pict-recording these events would be more than appropriate within the framework of my experiments."

"Observing Drukhari biomechanical patterns without any accompanying risk is very rare, Rogue Trader. I deemed that watching and pict-recording these events would be more than appropriate within the framework of my experiments."

languages.text: «Observar los patrones biomecánicos Drukhari sin riesgo es algo fuera de lo común, Comerciante Independiente. Decidí que observar y grabar imágenes de los sucesos sería más que suficiente para el marco de mis experimentos».
languages.original_text: "Observing Drukhari biomechanical patterns without any accompanying risk is very rare, Rogue Trader. I deemed that watching and pict-recording these events would be more than appropriate within the framework of my experiments."

traits.locale_text: «Observar los patrones biomecánicos Drukhari sin riesgo es algo fuera de lo común, Comerciante Independiente. Decidí que observar y grabar imágenes de los sucesos sería más que suficiente para el marco de mis experimentos».

languages.text: “能在毫无风险的情况下观察黑暗灵族的生物机械结构，这种机会极其罕见，行商浪人。我认为，在我的实验框架之内，观察并用图像记录这些事件是完全合理的做法。”
languages.original_text: "Observing Drukhari biomechanical patterns without any accompanying risk is very rare, Rogue Trader. I deemed that watching and pict-recording these events would be more than appropriate within the framework of my experiments."

traits.locale_text: “能在毫无风险的情况下观察黑暗灵族的生物机械结构，这种机会极其罕见，行商浪人。我认为，在我的实验框架之内，观察并用图像记录这些事件是完全合理的做法。”

languages.text: "Es ist nur sehr selten möglich, ohne Risiken biomechanische Muster von Drukhari zu beobachten, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Ich dachte, im Rahmen meiner Experimente wäre es mehr als angemessen, diese Ereignisse zu beobachten und Vid-Aufzeichnungen davon zu erstellen."
languages.original_text: "Observing Drukhari biomechanical patterns without any accompanying risk is very rare, Rogue Trader. I deemed that watching and pict-recording these events would be more than appropriate within the framework of my experiments."

traits.locale_text: "Es ist nur sehr selten möglich, ohne Risiken biomechanische Muster von Drukhari zu beobachten, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Ich dachte, im Rahmen meiner Experimente wäre es mehr als angemessen, diese Ereignisse zu beobachten und Vid-Aufzeichnungen davon zu erstellen."

languages.text: « Il est très rare de pouvoir observer les schémas biomécaniques des Drukhari sans risquer sa vie au passage, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. Regarder et enregistrer ces événements m'a paru particulièrement porteur dans le cadre de mes travaux. »
languages.original_text: "Observing Drukhari biomechanical patterns without any accompanying risk is very rare, Rogue Trader. I deemed that watching and pict-recording these events would be more than appropriate within the framework of my experiments."

traits.locale_text: « Il est très rare de pouvoir observer les schémas biomécaniques des Drukhari sans risquer sa vie au passage, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. Regarder et enregistrer ces événements m'a paru particulièrement porteur dans le cadre de mes travaux. »

languages.text: "Biyomekanik Drukhari kalıplarını risk olmaksızın gözlemlemek çok nadir bir durumdur Hür Tacir. Bu olayları izlemenin ve foto kaydıyla kaydetmenin deneylerim çerçevesinde fazlasıyla uygun olacağına kanaat getirdim."
languages.original_text: "Observing Drukhari biomechanical patterns without any accompanying risk is very rare, Rogue Trader. I deemed that watching and pict-recording these events would be more than appropriate within the framework of my experiments."

traits.locale_text: "Biyomekanik Drukhari kalıplarını risk olmaksızın gözlemlemek çok nadir bir durumdur Hür Tacir. Bu olayları izlemenin ve foto kaydıyla kaydetmenin deneylerim çerçevesinde fazlasıyla uygun olacağına kanaat getirdim."

languages.text: 「ドルーカリのバイオメカニズムの模様を、リスクを伴わずに観察することは非常に稀です。ローグ・トレーダー。これらの出来事を見守り、記録することは、私の実験の枠組みの中で、十分に適切だと判断しました。」
languages.original_text: "Observing Drukhari biomechanical patterns without any accompanying risk is very rare, Rogue Trader. I deemed that watching and pict-recording these events would be more than appropriate within the framework of my experiments."

traits.locale_text: 「ドルーカリのバイオメカニズムの模様を、リスクを伴わずに観察することは非常に稀です。ローグ・トレーダー。これらの出来事を見守り、記録することは、私の実験の枠組みの中で、十分に適切だと判断しました。」
